notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.

home.heroSubtitle: We match your direction and connect you with partners using clear contacts and links.
home.activityText: FondUz acts as a bridge between the user and specialized funds: the system structures directions, helps to choose the right specialization, shows partners' contacts, and provides a clear path to apply. We make navigating medical services calm and transparent so that a person can quickly find the right route without an overloaded interface and extra steps.
home.newsSubtitle: Brief updates of the platform and partner network.
home.faqsSubtitle: Key answers about the platform's operation.

about.title: About FondUz Platform
about.subtitle: FondUz does not provide clinical appointments. The platform acts as a bridge between users and partner funds.
about.body: FondUz acts as a bridge between the user and specialized funds: the system structures directions, helps to choose the right specialization, shows partners' contacts, and provides a clear path to apply.

services.title: Medical Directions
services.subtitle: Choose a profession and go to partner funds.

doctors.title: Specialists
doctors.subtitle: Specialist cards for orientation by professions and directions.

prices.title: Packages and Prices
prices.subtitle: Compare services in a convenient format. Final conditions are clarified with partners.

news.title: Platform News
news.subtitle: Up-to-date information on directions and partner funds.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Use the contacts below for questions regarding the platform. For appointments, go to the partner on the direction page.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Main questions about the bridge platform.

items.question: Is this a clinic?
items.answer: No. FondUz is an aggregator and a bridge to partner funds.

items.question: How to make an appointment?
items.answer: Open the desired direction and contact the partner by phone or website.

items.question: Where does the data on the site come from?
items.answer: Currently using typed mock data preparing for API.

items.question: Can I compare prices?
items.answer: Yes, the pricing section shows structured packages and service composition.

errors.messageMin: The message must be at least 10 characters long

footer.description: FondUz - an aggregator platform for medical directions and partner funds.

articles.title: Opening of the new FondUz platform
How to choose the right clinic

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.sub: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.
privacy.section1Desc: We collect only the data necessary for the effective operation of the platform and communication with partners.
privacy.section2Desc: Your data is used solely for navigation and improving the user experience on the FondUz site.
privacy.section3Desc: We take all modern security measures to prevent unauthorized access to information.
